name: ProgressCircle
visual_summary: ProgressCircle is a circular progress bar component. It's used to display the progress of a task or operation. It can be customized to have different colors and animations.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: ProgressCircle
Description: ProgressCircle is a circular progress bar component. It's used to display the progress of a task or operation. It can be customized to have different colors and animations.
Style: rounded, colorful, animated
Interactions: hoverable, clickable, animated
Tags: progress, bar, circle, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
